name: prompt-lab
description: Workspace para experimentar con prompts e imágenes

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir app
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd backend && uv sync
